# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Engine bug fixes and leak fix**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 merges upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and resolves a native resource leak. The Skia engine is updated with upstream chrome/m151 fixes, and a native handle leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData is resolved.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged** — Cherry-picked bug fixes from Chrome milestone 151 are now bundled, bringing stability improvements from upstream Skia. ([#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — Calling SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) with an SKRectI subset leaked a native handle. The handle is now released correctly. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
